reviews.comment:
Antes pasar por una de estación del ACA, era un placer. Hoy es triste ver como todo se ha degradado

(Translated by Google)
Passing through an ACA station used to be a pleasure. Today it's sad to see how everything has deteriorated.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMEozSHJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardan bastante en atender mientras esperas al sol en el auto, al menos la mayoria de las veces habia fila de 3 o mas autos, a veces muchos mas. La estación de Inflado de neumáticos anda pero se ve poco y esta incomoda para ver.

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve you while you wait in the sun in your car; most of the time there was a line of three or more cars, sometimes many more. The tire inflation station works, but it's hard to see and difficult to use.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCa01mMDN3RRAB
